Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants Pursuant To C.C.P. 664.6 Declaration Of Kambrie L. Keith, Esq. Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's F/K/A Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants Pursuant To C.C.P. 664.6.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted as unopposed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/CEK)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
